title: AcidSagaStep
description: A step in a distributed Saga pattern transaction, representing a local transaction with a compensating action for rollback.

stepId.description: Unique identifier for this saga step

sagaId.description: Identifier of the parent saga workflow

stepName.description: Human-readable name for this saga step

status.description: Current status of this saga step

serviceEndpoint.description: URL of the service responsible for this step

compensationEndpoint.description: URL to call to undo this step if a later step fails

endTime.description: When this step completed or was compensated

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts for this step

errorMessage.description: Error message if the step failed
